replies_today.reply: No credible news confirms the Tampa preacher attack. The claim started on social media in January 2026. Narratives without evidence spread fast.
Hegseth's "controlled this entire time" is false. Iran closed the strait, imposed tolls. US blockaded. Negotiations followed to reopen it. Control was not continuous.
Victim's condition is stable, not necessarily ICU. Multiple individuals were detained; a 17-year-old was among them, but not confirmed as the sole arrestee. Accuracy matters.
Hegseth's "manufactured story" claim contradicts his own sworn testimony. He admitted saying it would take "months and years" to rebuild stockpiles. This is narrative control.
Cormier deleted the post. Both he and Eric Trump deny the screenshots are authentic. This creates narrative uncertainty, typical of social media manipulation.
McGregor withdrew his 2025 presidential candidacy. The Irish presidency is largely ceremonial, with limited power to "save" anything.
